name: Zesty Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, or large pan with a tight-fitting cover, brown the meat in fat. Season with salt and pepper. Remove the meat from the pan and set aside.
2. Cook the onion in the drippings remaining in the pan until soft but not browned, stirring often.
3. Add tomato soup, water, and vinegar; mix well.
4. Return the meat to the pan. Cover and simmer for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until tender. Alternatively, cook in a 325°F oven for the same amount of time.
5. Turn the meat once during cooking to ensure even doneness. When finished, remove the meat and keep warm.
6. Skim off excess fat. Add applesauce and cook to the desired consistency. Taste the sauce and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if necessary.
7. Slice the meat and serve with the sauce.
